nodes.name: nuts_recursive_tree_build
nodes.description: Recursively builds a binary tree for a No-U-Turn Sampler (NUTS) step.

inputs.name: rng_key
inputs.constraints: explicit key for recursive proposal selection

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: left/right endpoints, proposal, valid count, stop/divergence flags, and acceptance statistics
